AccoRevit.Addin

Class XmlTagUtils

Namespace
AccoRevit.Addin.Utils
Assembly
AccoRevit.Addin.dll

Utility methods for reading annotation/tagging rules from the annotation configuration XML.

public static class XmlTagUtils
Inheritance
object
XmlTagUtils
Inherited Members
object.ToString()
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()

Remarks

Rules are stored under AnnotationSpecificationData nodes. This helper reads the XML namespace from the document root, filters nodes by TagType, and maps values into AnnotationRule instances.

Numeric values are parsed using InvariantCulture. Missing or invalid values fall back to defaults (e.g., offsets default to 0; placement defaults to AboveCenter).

Methods

LoadRules(IXmlService, string, string)

Loads an annotation configuration XML file and parses rules for a specific tag type.

public static List<AnnotationRule> LoadRules(IXmlService xmlService, string xmlFilePath, string tagType)

Parameters

xmlService IXmlService

Service used to load the XML document.

xmlFilePath string

Path to the XML file to read.

tagType string

The tag type token to match (case-insensitive).

Returns

List<AnnotationRule>

A list of AnnotationRule entries matching tagType; otherwise an empty list.

Remarks

This method performs a synchronous wait on LoadXmlAsync(string, CancellationToken). It is intended for use in Revit external commands where synchronous control flow is typical.

Exceptions

ArgumentNullException

Thrown when xmlService is null or xmlFilePath is null/empty/whitespace.

ParseRules(XDocument, string)

Parses annotation rules from an already-loaded XML document for a specific tag type.

public static List<AnnotationRule> ParseRules(XDocument xdoc, string tagType)

Parameters

xdoc XDocument

The loaded XML document.

tagType string

The tag type token to match (case-insensitive).

Returns

List<AnnotationRule>

A list of AnnotationRule entries matching tagType; otherwise an empty list.

Remarks

This method derives the XML namespace from xdoc's root element and uses it to locate AnnotationSpecificationData nodes.

The family file path is resolved by preferring AnnotationFamilyFilePathValue when present, and falling back to AnnotationFamilyFilePath.
